HomePage.title: Build and Manage Your AI Agents with HexaCore
HomePage.description: An enterprise-grade platform for orchestrating, managing, and deploying intelligent agents. Supports OpenAI, DeepSeek, and Qwen models out of the box.
HomePage.featuresDesc: Everything you need to build production-ready agents.
HomePage.feature1Desc: Seamlessly switch between OpenAI, DeepSeek, and Qwen models.
HomePage.feature2Desc: Advanced routing engine to dispatch tasks to the most suitable agent.
HomePage.feature3Desc: Run agent code safely with granular permission controls.

Dashboard.title: Dashboard
Dashboard.agentsDesc: Manage your AI agents and their configurations.
Dashboard.basicInfoDesc: Configure agent name, description, and model parameters
Dashboard.skillsSectionDesc: Select skills for this agent, or upload a new skill package (.zip)
Dashboard.memorySharingDesc: Select shared memory spaces this agent can access for cross-agent knowledge sharing
Dashboard.memoryEmptyDesc: Create a memory space to share knowledge between agents
